S.FORM: == Alex Acker == u siwkay niza Alex Acker (nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1983 a mihcan), Alex Acker, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. 2005 a mihcan mapili' nu Titeluy Huosay putiput. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: šļěŚą©ŚÖčśĖĮ¬∑ťėŅŚÖč u ngangan nu Amilika: Alex Acker kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alex Maurice Acker is an American professional basketball player who last played for Pallacanestro Cant√Ļ of the Lega Basket Serie A (LBA). He played college basketball for Pepperdine University.
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺ…ô* a ¶k…ôr == u siwkaj niza ar~…ĺ…ô* a ¶k…ôr (nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶an), ar~…ĺ…ô* a ¶k…ôr, miunduaj. mimar~…ĺi i amir~…ĺika nba. **** a mińß ¶an mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° nu tit…ôr~…ĺuj ńßuosaj putiput. u ŇčaŇčan niza u ŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******* u ŇčaŇčan nu amir~…ĺika: ar~…ĺ…ô* a ¶k…ôr kakuniza kar~…ĺunasur~…ĺitan-sur~…ĺu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺ…ô* mauri ¶…ô a ¶k…ôr is an am…ôri ¶an prof…ôssionar~…ĺ bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ pr~…ĺaj…ôr wńßo r~…ĺast pr~…ĺaj…ôd for par~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶an…ôstro ¶ant* of tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôga bask…ôt s…ôri…ô a (r~…ĺba). ńß…ô pr~…ĺaj…ôd ¶or~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôg…ô bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ for p…ôpp…ôrdin…ô uni*…ôrsitj.
S.FORM: == Alex Acker == u siwkay niza Alex Acker (nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1983 a mihcan), Alex Acker, miunduay. mimali i Amilika NBA. 2005 a mihcan mapili' nu Titeluy Huosay putiput. u ngangan niza u ngangan nu Hulam: šļěŚą©ŚÖčśĖĮ¬∑ťėŅŚÖč u ngangan nu Amilika: Alex Acker kakuniza kalunasulitan-sulu u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Alex Maurice Acker is an American professional basketball player who last played for Pallacanestro Cant√Ļ of the Lega Basket Serie A (LBA). He played college basketball for Pepperdine University.
